name: Tesserent Limited
summary: Tesserent Limited provides a range of Internet security services in Australia and internationally. The company operates through three segments: Pure Security Group, North, and IT Security Managed Services. Its Internet security services include Internet Security-as-a-Service, security penetration testing, consulting, and software licensing. The company offers managed security services, including managed firewall, managed security information and event management, email filtering and security, web filtering and security, data center and colocation, and threat hunting. It also provides security consulting services, such as security audit, security culture as a service, and penetration testing; connectivity solutions, including point-to-point and multi-point internet services, as well as managed SD-WAN that combines public and private networks into a single, agile, and virtualized solutions; and operates security operations center. The company serves education, manufacturing, transport and logistics, finance, insurance and legal, and government sectors. Tesserent Limited was incorporated in 2015 and is based in Box Hill, Australia.
